no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-755f5881 is already implemented at the base-rev (cc7467de).

The work landed in commit 2d1e5903 "feat(routing): default path issues one
ResolveRoute call, escalation is opt-in [ddx-755f5881]", which was merged
into main via d71ea056 before this attempt's base-rev was checkpointed.

The prior REVIEW:BLOCK note ("Diff under review contains only execution
evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) — no source code changes")
appears to have been a false positive: the reviewer was shown a diff that
included only the post-merge execution-evidence chore commit and missed
the actual source diff in 2d1e5903.

AC verification against the current base-rev (no edits required):

  AC #1 — workerDispatchAdapter.DispatchWorker({}) → {Profile:"default"}
    Source: cli/internal/server/graphql_adapters.go lines 113-120
    Test:   cli/internal/server/graphql_adapters_default_profile_test.go

  AC #2 — default `ddx agent run` calls ResolveRoute exactly once with
          Profile:"default" and no other fields
    Source: cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go lines 325-367
    Test:   cli/cmd/agent_run_default_route_test.go
            (TestAgentRunDefaultPathCallsResolveRouteOnceWithDefaultProfile)

  AC #3 — ResolveProfileLadder / ResolveTierModelRef NOT in default-path
          call graph (verified via call-counter test seam)
    Source: cli/internal/agent/profile_ladder.go lines 20-39
    Test:   same as AC #2 (asserts both counters == 0)

  AC #4 — historical 19-burn drain config no longer fans out to per-tier
          ladder iteration
    Test:   cli/internal/server/graphql_adapters_default_profile_test.go

  AC #5 — --escalate flag still routes through tier-ladder machinery
    Source: cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go line 1624 (flag definition) and
            singleTierAttempt / tier-ladder path at lines 1849, 1917
    Test:   cli/cmd/agent_execute_loop_escalate_test.go
            (TestAgentExecuteLoopEscalateFlagRecognized,
             TestAgentExecuteLoopDefaultPathDoesNotEscalate)

  AC #6 — config schema unchanged (deprecation belongs to
          routing-config-deprecation, ddx-87fb72c2)

Targeted test runs against the affected packages all pass:
  go test ./cmd/ ./internal/server/ ./internal/agent/  → ok

Nothing to add or change; committing a no-op edit would just churn the
tree. A follow-up attempt would only be needed if a reviewer can point to
a specific AC item that is NOT satisfied by the code at base-rev cc7467de.
